title: Forza Tier Tagger
body:
**Forza TierTagger** – See Every Player’s PvP Tier Instantly
A lightweight, **client-side only** mod that displays **Forza TierList** ranks directly in player nametags and in the tab list – in real time.

Automatically syncs with the official FORZA API (https://tierlist.forzasmp.net) refreshed everytime you restart minecraft (configurable). Works on **any server**, no server-side installation needed.

## Features
- Real-time tier display in nametags and in the tab list
- Offline account supported
- Smart local caching – works fully offline after first load
- Fully compatible with Feather Client and all major clients
## Technical
- Client-side only – safe for every server
- Fabric 1.21-1.21.11
- Requires Fabric API

ARR License

**Tierlist Website**: https://tierlist.forzasmp.net
**Tiertest Discord**: https://dsc.gg/forzasmp
